title: rubia horrida
intro: Rubia horrida, also known as the wild madder or Himalayan madder, is a species of flowering plant in the madder genus, Rubia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to act as a natural dye. The health benefits of Rubia horrida include its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Rubia horrida can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
